cloudflare_zone_id.description: Cloudflare zone ID to attach rulesets to. Sourced from $CLOUDFLARE_ZONE_ID or equivalent in CI.

cloudflare_account_id.description: Cloudflare account ID. Required when attaching account-scoped rulesets / lists. Sourced from $CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID.

example-cdn-security_custom.name: example-cdn-security-custom
example-cdn-security_custom.description: CDN Security Framework: custom firewall rules (geo/IP/UA/fingerprint)

rules.expression: (lower(http.user_agent) contains "sqlmap" or lower(http.user_agent) contains "nikto" or lower(http.user_agent) contains "acunetix" or lower(http.user_agent) contains "masscan" or lower(http.user_agent) contains "python-requests")
